summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned; merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal close are disabled for this job. The listed PRs should remain open for maintainer review, author follow-up, or proof/check repair as applicable. One linked security-sensitive PR is routed separately.

actions.reason: Open focused feature PR with proof and passing checks, but this shard is not allowed to merge or make technical correctness judgments; keep it open independently for maintainer review.

Related to the AgentHarness tool-registry hardening family, but not safe to close as duplicate or superseded because the hydrated evidence shows a distinct behavior shape and it is maintainer-owned draft work.

Related to a session-state bug family already discussed in linked issues, but failing proof/checks and contributor context make closure or fixed-by-candidate unsafe. Keep open for maintainer proof/check judgment.
